heading: Regulations
label: 4953 Regulations
text: The Secretary of Defense shall prescribe regulations to carry out this chapter, and shall consult with an association recognized under section 4954(f) regarding any revisions to such regulations.1See References in Text note below.1
notes: References in TextSection 4954(f), referred to in text, was redesignated as , and a new subsec. (f) of was added, by , (3), , .section 4954(e) of this titlesection 4954 of this titlePub. L. 118–31, div. A, title VIII, § 853(b)(2)137 Stat. 344Dec. 22, 2023
